items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: The rescued Gondola appears to be shouting something.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: You came across a "siren"? A creature with a human body and a fishtail?

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Could there be another being like Lorelei?

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: I suspect that the fish we saw earlier is connected to this "siren."

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: There's got to be a reason it stayed fresh after all these weeks.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: This means we need to think of a way to get that fish out of Mr. Starbuck's hands.

options.text: We're running low on options here.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Well, only one way to find out.

items.speaker: Queequeg
items.text: You bring material. Queequeg fix ship.
